title: Ability to Add Workspaces to Favorites
excerpt: I would love the ability to add individual workspaces to my favorites list. We use multiple Monday products (WorkOS, CRM, Project Manager) and navigating between each workspace can sometimes be confusing, particularly fo…

posts.author: Vtab (Vero Tabares)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love the ability to add individual workspaces to my favorites list. We use multiple Monday products (WorkOS, CRM, Project Manager) and navigating between each workspace can sometimes be confusing, particularly for less tech savvy team members.

Our process workflow creates boards on multiple workspaces that may only exist for a short period of time so adding those individual boards to the favorites list makes little sense for us, but being able to navigate to a specific workspace to access those boards would make navigating Monday a smoother and more pleasant experience.

posts.author: Foxc (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is currently not possible to add a Workspace (only a Board) to Favourites.
If there are a lot of Workspaces, it can take some time to search through to get to the Workspace you are looking for.
It would be a good feature to be able to add Workspaces to favourites.
